coord._comment: Local coord bus on Corazon (laptop-agent). 8 coord.* tools for inter-CC-tab coordination. Workers identify via X-Tab-Id + X-Tab-Credential headers, or via tab_id/tab_credential in tool params. Shipped 2026-05-18.

factory._comment_local: VPS-only path; ignored on Corazon. Will be subsumed by /api/mcp/ecodia-full HTTP proxy in a follow-up sprint.

visual-test._comment_phase_2_08: Visual testing substrate shipped 2026-05-15 (Phase 2 / 08). Wraps laptop-hands HTTP service at HANDS_URL with HMAC over HANDS_SHARED_SECRET. Surfaces browser.* + android.* + ios.* (stubs) + visual.* recipe/regression tools. Reachable via ecodia-full proxy once registered server-side.

ecodia-full._disabled_reason: code@ Claude routines were stalling on per-tool 'Allow Claude to use X?' dialogs because Claude preferred this project-local server over the auto-approved account-level narrow connectors. Removed from active mcpServers to force routine + Corazon sessions to use the narrow connectors (ecodia-core, ecodia-comms, ecodia-scheduler, ecodia-crm, ecodia-graph, ecodia-money, ecodia-code, ecodia-factory, ecodia-supabase) which auto-approve via the account connector path. Aligns with the 2026-06-14 ecodia-full deprecation. To re-enable: move this block back under mcpServers.
